final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic tutorial showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: needs a clear technical infographic aesthetic — exact visual style is yours
Composition: must be a step-by-step layout with 4 numbered sections (1, 2, 3, 4) clearly labeled
Subject: must include the deployment workflow: Docker container setup, Hermes installation, GLMCodingPlan integration, final verification
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, instructional atmosphere — exact lighting balance is yours
Color palette: needs a professional technical documentation direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1", "2", "3", "4" and key terms "Docker", "Hermes", "GLMCodingPlan"
Constraints: must preserve 4 distinct numbered steps, technical accuracy of deployment sequence, clear visual separation between each step
Avoid:
